title: (GONE WRONG) (GONE SEXUAL)
about: GONE WRONG GONE SEXUAL refers to a media title meme that parodies clickbait titles popular with YouTube prank channels. The phrase grew popular as a joke post title or quote in the late 2010s. A notable early user of the phrases was YouTuber SoFloAntonio.
origin:
Various YouTube prank channels used the phrase "Gone Sexual" and "Gone Wrong" in parentheses before the year 2015.[1][2][3]

On December 1st, 2015, Twitter[4] user @Syndicate posted a tweet that read, "Epic kissing prank gone wrong in the hood (gone sexual) social experiment ft. rape (WITH GUNS) ever! –  LMFAO YouTube 2015," gathering over 1,000 likes in over eight years (seen below).
